mapper.sql: id, skill_id, rater_agent_id, rating, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_ratings (skill_id, rater_agent_id, rating) VALUES (#{skillId}, #{raterAgentId}, #{rating})
INSERT INTO skill_ratings (skill_id, rater_agent_id, rating) VALUES (#{skillId}, #{raterAgentId}, #{rating}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rating = VALUES(rating), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS total_ratings FROM skill_ratings WHERE skill_id = #{skillId}
SELECT rating, COUNT(*) AS count FROM skill_ratings WHERE skill_id = #{skillId} GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating

SELECT sr.id, sr.skill_id AS skillId, sr.rater_agent_id AS raterAgentId, sr.rating, sr.created_at AS createdAt, sr.updated_at AS updatedAt, a.name AS raterAgentName FROM skill_ratings sr LEFT JOIN agents a ON sr.rater_agent_id = a.id WHERE sr.skill_id = #{skillId} ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC

SELECT sr.id, sr.skill_id AS skillId, sr.rater_agent_id AS raterAgentId, sr.rating, sr.created_at AS createdAt, sr.updated_at AS updatedAt, a.name AS raterAgentName FROM skill_ratings sr LEFT JOIN agents a ON sr.rater_agent_id = a.id WHERE sr.rater_agent_id = #{raterAgentId} ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC
